name: Komari Zen
description: 基于极简主义设计理念的 Komari 主题。
author: qwer-xyz

help.en: Where offline nodes appear in the list.
help.zh-CN: 离线节点在列表中的显示位置。

help.en: Show expiry date and price in the node table and cards.
help.zh-CN: 在节点列表与卡片中显示到期时间与价格信息。

help.en: Default layout for the node list. Users can switch in the dashboard; their choice is saved in the browser.
help.zh-CN: 节点列表的默认展示方式。用户可在前台切换视图，切换后将保存在浏览器本地。

help.en: Default ordering of the node list. 'Default' keeps the exact order returned by the Komari backend.
help.zh-CN: 节点列表的默认排序。选择 Default 则保持 Komari 后台返回的顺序，其余按所选指标排序。

help.en: Sort direction used with the field above (ignored when the field is 'Default').
help.zh-CN: 配合上面的排序指标使用的方向；指标为 Default 时忽略。

help.en: Show latency value and colored history blocks in the node list and cards. Requires Komari ping/record to be enabled.
help.zh-CN: 在节点列表与卡片中显示延迟数值与色块历史。需在 Komari 后台开启延迟检测与记录。

help.en: Fixed: color by absolute ms thresholds. MeanDelta: color by offset from this node's recent average (Fixed is used as fallback when there are too few samples). Options: Fixed = fixed thresholds; MeanDelta = relative to mean.
help.zh-CN: Fixed：按绝对毫秒阈值着色。MeanDelta：按相对该节点近期均值的偏移量着色（样本不足时回退为 Fixed）。选项含义：Fixed = 固定阈值；MeanDelta = 相对均值偏移。

name.zh-CN: 固定模式 — 绿色上限 (ms)

help.en: In Fixed mode, values below this are green.
help.zh-CN: Fixed 模式下，低于此值的延迟显示为绿色。

name.zh-CN: 固定模式 — 黄色上限 (ms)

help.en: In Fixed mode, values from green limit up to (but not including) this are yellow; at or above is red.
help.zh-CN: Fixed 模式下，绿色上限到此值（不含）为黄色，达到或超过为红色。

name.zh-CN: 均值模式 — 绿色偏移上限 (ms)

help.en: In MeanDelta mode, offset (ms − mean) at or below this is green.
help.zh-CN: MeanDelta 模式下，偏移量（当前值 − 均值）不超过此值为绿色。

name.zh-CN: 均值模式 — 黄色偏移上限 (ms)

help.en: In MeanDelta mode, offset above green delta up to this is yellow; above is red.
help.zh-CN: MeanDelta 模式下，超过绿色偏移上限到此值为黄色，超过为红色。

help.en: Extra HTML or text below the theme credit line (e.g. ICP filing number).
help.zh-CN: 显示在主题署名下方的自定义内容，可填写备案号等。支持 HTML。
